samples.text: The door is fully closed and fully open at the very same instant. Is this logically consistent?
The door is entirely shut and entirely open at the same moment. Does this make logical sense?
The entrance is completely closed and completely open at once. Is this logically consistent?
Fully closed and fully open are opposite states. They cannot coexist at one instant. Is the described situation logically consistent?
The door is fully closed and fully open at the very same instant. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Is this logically consistent?
